commit_scope: Release bootstrap Python adapter tissue onto the Form-native kernel-bmf compile/run path and repair the compiler gaps exposed by the three-way parity gate.

local_validation.notes: Prompt guide passed in the dedicated worktree. Go and Rust kernels built. The Python adapter parity suite passed 38/38 with CPython, Form-native compiled .fk on Rust, and kernel-bmf-run. The benchmark matched results across all three paths and measured compiled Rust at 0.38x CPython time for examples/python_demo.py; kernel-bmf-run remains startup-heavy because it includes source compile/prelude orchestration per invocation. Wellness passed with bootstrap weight at 11 files / 6504 LOC and the third-runtime selector released.

ci_validation.notes: Remote CI is pending until this branch is committed, pushed, and opened as a PR.

deploy_validation.notes: No deploy attempted before PR; local wellness reports production currently aligned with origin/main.

phase_gate.notes: Local compiler/parity/performance/wellness proof passes. Commit, push, PR, remote CI, merge, deploy, and public verification remain pending.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The Python adapter release gate now routes through kernel-bmf-compile and kernel-bmf-run instead of the stale TypeScript evaluator path. The Form-native Python compiler now handles function params, final expression fallback, local while/for helpers, polymorphic plus, class constructors, and Python round(x, n) through round_ndigits.
public_endpoints: internal Form kernel Python adapter release gate
test_flows: kernel-bmf-compile examples/python_bridge_demo.py emits a non-empty .fk recipe that Rust executes as 720.
parity_suite.sh compares CPython, compiled Rust .fk, and kernel-bmf-run for 38 shipped Python demos/endpoints.
perf_compare.sh refuses divergent runtime results before reporting timing.
make wellness reports the Python adapter release line and released third-runtime selector.

evidence_refs: form/form-kernel-ts/seedbank/python-adapter/scripts/perf_compare.sh examples/python_demo.py -> cpy=40949 rust=40949 kernel-bmf=40949; compiled Rust 28.23 ms vs CPython 73.83 ms.

form/form-stdlib/grammars/python-bmf-compiler.fk repairs final expression fallback, loop helper locality, destructuring, class constructor params/records, polymorphic plus, and round_ndigits lowering.

make wellness passed and reports bootstrap weight 11 files / 6504 LOC, python adapter release 4/4 parser/emitter/CLI files deleted, 2/2 scripts on kernel-bmf path, and third-runtime selector released.
bash -n, python3 -m py_compile, and git diff --check passed.
